raw_consumer_statement: This is my third attempt at a complaint. Citibank allowed fraudulent activity on my account and is not refunding me the full amount. They stated {$100.00} that is not correct. The full amount for fraudulent charges is {$250.00}. I did not even have a card after XX/XX/year> yet they allowed fraudulent charges to be made but me as the owner of the card couldnt even access my account bc I didnt have a cv number. Thus is not acceptable that I have to go back and forth. It is not acceptable the hold me responsible for charges I didnt make whereas I didnt even have my card and the charges were made at same place you flagged before I cancelled. You gave the same people, the same companies platforms whatever you call it access to my card. You better take that full amount off and someone needs to investigate the investigation team for Citibank because theyre not too bright.
